description: Dr. Blocks discusses the evolution and efficiency of Switchboard, an oracle service for Solana, highlighting its journey since 2021, the challenges of sourcing pricing data, and the introduction of their on-demand pricing service.
topic_summary: The presentation covers the development of Switchboard, its role in providing secure pricing data for Solana, and the transition to a more efficient on-demand model for data retrieval [t=250.52].
